commentary_links.hebrew: וְחֵ֤לֶב נְבֵלָה֙ וְחֵ֣לֶב טְרֵפָ֔ה יֵעָשֶׂ֖ה לְכׇל־מְלָאכָ֑ה וְאָכֹ֖ל לֹ֥א תֹאכְלֻֽהוּ׃
commentary_links.english: Fat from animals that died or were torn by beasts may be put to any use, but you must not eat it.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: &star תנו רבנן וחלב נבלה וחלב טרפה בחלב בהמה טהורה

commentary_links.hebrew: וְכׇל־נֶ֗פֶשׁ אֲשֶׁ֨ר תֹּאכַ֤ל נְבֵלָה֙ וּטְרֵפָ֔ה בָּאֶזְרָ֖ח וּבַגֵּ֑ר וְכִבֶּ֨ס בְּגָדָ֜יו וְרָחַ֥ץ בַּמַּ֛יִם וְטָמֵ֥א עַד־הָעֶ֖רֶב וְטָהֵֽר׃
commentary_links.english: Any person, whether citizen or stranger, who eats what has died or has been torn by beasts shall wash their clothes, bathe in water, remain impure until evening—and shall then be pure.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: משום בל תאכל חלב נבלה יצאתה זו שאין

commentary_links.hebrew: נְבֵלָ֧ה וּטְרֵפָ֛ה לֹ֥א יֹאכַ֖ל לְטׇמְאָה־בָ֑הּ אֲנִ֖י יְהֹוָֽה׃
commentary_links.english: He shall not eat anything that died or was torn by beasts, thereby becoming impure: I am G<small>OD</small>.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: איסורה משום בל תאכל חלב נבלה אלא
